scope: Page 9 layout after promoting Figure 4 to a wide main-paper InternNav panel.
issue_before: The wide Figure 4 made page 9's right column start with a dangling continuation of the Limitations paragraph before Ethical Considerations.

source_change.summary: Tightened the final InternNav limitation sentence so the right column starts cleanly at Ethical Considerations while preserving the claim boundary.

visible_evidence: Page 9 now keeps Figure 4 at the top and starts the right text column with Ethical Considerations rather than a dangling Limitations continuation.
The rendered page and InternNav source figure contain zero strong-red pixels under the spot-check threshold.
The wide real InternNav panel remains readable and does not introduce overlap, blank columns, or page growth.

claim_boundary.may_support: cleaner reader-facing layout for selected official KuJiaLe InternNav qualitative evidence
must_not_support: new experimental evidence beyond the already recorded wide InternNav panel

imagegen_note: No new generated bitmap was used for this layout polish. Figure 1 remains the AI-generated method-chain roadmap; Figure 4 remains recorded real InternNav evidence.
recommendation: Keep this compact limitation wording unless a later layout change reintroduces a right-column continuation.
